test-case.sql: insert into t_user(user_id, user_name, password, email, address, city, country, province, creation_date) values(1, '漢漢漢漢漢漢漢漢漢漢漢漢漢漢漢漢漢漢漢漢', '密码密码密码密码密码', '邮箱邮箱邮箱邮箱邮箱', '地址地址地址地址地址', '城市城市城市城市城市', '国家国家国家国家国家', '省份省份省份省份省份', '2024-08-09')

initial-sql.sql: CREATE TABLE t_user (user_id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_name VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, password VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, email VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, address varchar(10) not null, city varchar(10) NOT NULL, country varchar(10) not null, province varchar(10) not null, creation_date DATE NOT NULL)

test-case.sql: insert into t_user(user_id, user_name, password, email, address, city, country, province, creation_date) values(3, 'Data_Ninja__Analyst_', 'mypassword', 'my_email12', 'address_12', 'address_12', 'address_12', 'address_12', '2024-08-09')

initial-sql.sql: CREATE TABLE t_user (user_id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_name VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, password VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, email VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, address varchar(10) not null, city varchar(10) NOT NULL, country varchar(10) not null, province varchar(10) not null, creation_date DATE NOT NULL) DEFAULT CHARSET=latin1
